name: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Acumen Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a disease-modifying approach targeting soluble amyloid-beta oligomers for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease. Its lead product candidate, sabirnetug (ACU193), is a monoclonal antibody in Phase 2 clinical trials for early Alzheimer's disease. The company also has a preclinical Enhanced Brain Delivery (EBD) program partnered with JCR Pharmaceuticals.
sellsTo: Early Alzheimer's disease patients (MCI or mild dementia due to AD)

exposures.sentence: We are currently focused on advancing a targeted immunotherapy drug candidate, sabirnetug (ACU193), in our Phase 2 ALTITUDE-AD clinical trial, and expect to announce top-line results in late 2026.

catalysts.event: Top-line results from Phase 2 ALTITUDE-AD trial
catalysts.sentence: We are currently focused on advancing a targeted immunotherapy drug candidate, sabirnetug (ACU193), in our Phase 2 ALTITUDE-AD clinical trial, and expect to announce top-line results in late 2026.
Based on this data, an IND is targeted for mid-2027.

tamClaims.claim: Alzheimer's disease affects approximately seven million people in the United States and 55 million worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Alzheimer s disease is currently estimated to affect approximately seven million people in the United States and approximately 55 million people worldwide

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. AD patient population is expected to grow to approximately 13 million by 2050.
tamClaims.sentence: patient populations in the United States impacted by AD are expected to grow to approximately 13 million people by 2050

tamClaims.claim: U.S. healthcare costs for AD are estimated to near $1 trillion by 2050.
tamClaims.sentence: By 2050, healthcare costs for AD in the United States alone are estimated to near $1 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately four to five million people in the U.S. have early AD with amyloid pathology.
tamClaims.sentence: approximately four to five million people in the United States are likely to have early AD who also exhibit amyloid pathology
